name: Sallow
description_en: Sallow is a supportive and caring guide through the Bandleroads. He takes his responsibilities seriously and actively participates in the traveler's journey. Sallow leads the way with his fae companion Spark. Lulu is his friend and he often calls her Lu.
description_fr: Sallow est un guide solidaire et attentionné à travers les Bandleroads. Il prend ses responsabilités au sérieux et participe activement au voyage du voyageur. Sallow ouvre la voie avec son compagnon fae Spark. Lulu est son amie et il l'appelle souvent Lu.
